caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones speaks into a black microphone in a room filled with framed photos on the wall and clothing racks in the background. His green shirt features the text "I ON NEVER DO SMUT" in white lettering. A white mannequin wearing a white garment stands behind him. To the left and right of the screen, circular logos and red text that reads "MODERNLY" and "TOT" are visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is captured mid-conversation, shifting his facial expressions and gesturing with his hands. He begins with his right hand raised near his chest and ends with both hands extended outward as he continues talking. The background and equipment remain static, while the man's movements provide the only change in the scene.
